import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; // Optional: replace with your real poster image later // import poster from "../../../assets/ubuntu_dawn_poster.png"; export default function DemoLicenseModal({ open, onClose, onStartDownload }) { useEffect(() => { if (!open) return; const prev = document.body.style.overflow; document.body.style.overflow = "hidden"; return () => { document.body.style.overflow = prev; }; }, [open]); if (!open) return null; return (

Download Demo Film

position: "relative", width: "min(1100px, 100%)", maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 32px)", // ✅ ALWAYS fits borderRadius: 14, border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.32)", overflow: "hidden", boxShadow: "0 26px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.60)", }, panelBg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", filter: "brightness(1.12) contrast(1.06) saturate(1.06)", transform: zIndex: 1, pointerEvents: "none", }, scroller: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 32px)", // match panel overflowY: "auto", // ✅ internal scroll if needed padding: 26, color: fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.05, textShadow: "0 10px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, subtitle: { margin: "10px auto 0", maxWidth: 760, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.45, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.74)", textShadow: "0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.40)", }, closeBtn: { justifySelf: "end", width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: 10, border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.20)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.88)", fontSize: 22, cursor: "pointer", lineHeight: "40px", }, main: { marginTop: 18, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "360px 1fr", gap: 18, alignItems: "stretch", }, leftCard: { borderRadius: 12, border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.26)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.20)", backdropFilter: "blur(3px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(3px)", padding: 14, }, posterFrame: { borderRadius: 10, border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.22)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", overflow: "hidden", aspectRatio: "3 / 4", }, posterPlaceholder: { width: "100%", height: "100%", display: "grid", placeItems: "center", position: "relative", background: "linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,180,90,0.10), rgba(0,0,0,0.35))", }, posterTextTop: { position: "absolute", top: "22%", fontSize: 44, fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 2, opacity: 0.9, textShadow: "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, posterTextBottom: { position: "absolute", bottom: "18%", fontSize: 40, fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 2, opacity: 0.9, textShadow: "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, metaRow: { marginTop: 10, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.80)", }, metaItem: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, fontSize: 16, }, metaIcon: { opacity: 0.9, }, stepsCol: { display: "grid", gap: 14, }, stepCard: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "56px 1fr", gap: 14, alignItems: "center", borderRadius: 12, border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.22)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.18)", backdropFilter: "blur(3px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(3px)", padding: "18px 18px", minHeight: 92, }, stepIconCircle: { width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: 999, display: "grid", placeItems: "center", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.40)", color: "rgba(255,200,140,0.95)", fontWeight: 800, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.18)", }, stepIconBox: { width: 44, height: 44, borderRadius: 10, display: "grid", placeItems: "center", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.26)", transform: "translateX(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 6px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.35))", }, clapperSmall: { fontSize: 18, transform: "translateY(1px)", opacity: 0.9, }, stepTitle: { fontSize: 26, fontWeight: textAlign: "center", paddingTop: 14, paddingBottom: 8, }, footerDivider: { height: 1, background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,170,80,0), rgba(255,170,80,0.26), rgba(255,170,80,0))", marginBottom: 16, }, footerTitle: { fontSize: 38, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 12, textShadow: "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, ctaBtn: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", gap: 14, padding: "14px 26px", minWidth: 420, maxWidth: "100%", borderRadius: 6, border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.24)", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #FFAE2B 0%, #CF5A10 100%)", boxShadow: "0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.36)", cursor: "pointer", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 22, lineHeight: 1, textShadow: "0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.36)", }, ctaTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "9px solid transparent", borderBottom: "9px solid transparent", borderLeft: "14px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95)", transform: "translateY(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.25))", }, ctaLabel: { whiteSpace: "nowrap", }, }; const css = ` /* Responsive: stack columns on smaller screens */ @media (max-width: 980px) { .cb-modal-main { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } .cb-modal-panel { width: min(980px, 100%) !important; } } /* Make scroll feel nicer */ .cb-modal-scroller::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; } .cb-modal-scroller::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .cb-modal-scroller::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,170,80,0.22); border-radius: 999px; } `;
